Matters of Importance and Some Not in the AI ​​Space

By Paco
user.name: Paco

tweets.text:
One of the best uses of Claude is not planning.

It is anti-planning.

A premortem forces the model to assume your plan already failed, then explain why.

That matters because asking “is this a good idea?” usually pulls Claude into supportive mode. It looks for what works, https://t.co/oC5H4w25Zh
tweets.name: Paco

tweets.text:
Claude for Small Business might be one of the most underrated AI drops for operators.

The full breakdown of its 31 skills makes it obvious why.

Every workflow.
Every connector.
Every automation.
Explained in under 10 minutes.
This is the same package that hit 382,000 downloads https://t.co/M1cl5GLryo
tweets.name: Paco

tweets.text:
The traditional agency org chart is already becoming obsolete.

Functions and handoffs are being replaced by agent loops and outcome systems.

The old structure optimized for labor.

The new structure optimizes for feedback, memory, and execution velocity.

Every role owns a https://t.co/KSk0fHxedO
tweets.name: Paco

tweets.text:
Most AI agents fail before they even answer the first prompt.

Because they have no identity.

That’s what SOUL.md fixes.

It’s the file every agent reads before doing anything.

Without it:

no personality
no boundaries
no durable behavior
just a raw LLM improvising every https://t.co/YKhN7TxwDW
tweets.name: Paco
